mapper.select: SELECT p.point_id, p.member_idx, p.change_amount, p.change_reason, p.point_amount, p.change_date, m.member_id, -- member 테이블에서 가져온 회원 로그인 ID m.member_name -- member 테이블에서 가져온 회원 이름 (필요시) FROM point p JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE p.member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY p.change_date DESC, p.point_id DESC
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT point_amount FROM point WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY point_id DESC LIMIT 1), 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point (member_idx, point_amount,change_amount, change_reason, change_date) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{change_amount}, #{change_amount}, #{change_reason}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT p.point_id, p.member_idx, m.member_id, p.point_amount, p.change_amount, p.change_reason, p.change_date, p.point_status FROM point p JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortOrder} LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM point p JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE 1=1
